summary: Tested VC-native 7-stage deal flow system. All backend endpoints pass. ReviewMode UI fully functional with correct Inbound filtering, 4-button bar, swipe hints, PassModal, WatchlistModal. Dashboard STAGE_STYLES has all 7 stages. DetailPanel deal-stage-section is conditionally rendered (only visible when user is in a fund — expected behavior, validated in code).
critical_code_review_comments: DetailPanel deal-stage-section (Progress/Exit State rows, stage buttons, pass_reason input, watchlist_revisit_date picker) only renders when user is in a fund (inFund condition). This is correct behavior. Cannot test these elements without a fund — requires running the SQL migration and creating/joining a fund.

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all UI elements verified; DetailPanel stage section not testable without fund membership)

test_credentials: JWT from test_credentials.md used for all tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: ReviewMode: 4 Inbound deals load from sample data. All 4 buttons work (Pass, Watch List, Draft Reply, First Look). PassModal/WatchlistModal open/close/submit correctly. Backend stage endpoint accepts pass_reason and watchlist_revisit_date. Migration runs on startup. Dashboard STAGE_STYLES has all 7 stages. DetailPanel stage section requires inFund=true to render — needs fund membership SQL tables to test fully.

feature_test_checklist.PassModal 'Confirm Pass' submits: PASS (API call verified in backend tests)
feature_test_checklist.DetailPanel Progress row (Inbound→Closed: CODE VERIFIED — requires fund membership to render in UI
feature_test_checklist.DetailPanel Exit State row (Passed, Watc: CODE VERIFIED — requires fund membership to render in UI
